title: One Block Original
description: A challenging and addictive One Block modpack where every block counts, letting you start from a single block and gradually expand your world with creativity, strategy, and endless surprises.
body:
One Block Original is a modpack where you start on a single block and expand your world by breaking it to generate resources. 

You progress through different block types, gather materials, craft tools, automate processes, and build structures. 

The goal is to survive, explore, and grow your world efficiently while managing limited space and resources.
